# QuickScale Media

> A Lititz, Pennsylvania marketing agency built only for home service businesses
> (painters, roofers, gutter, floor-coating, landscaping, HVAC, and similar trades).
> We run Facebook & Instagram (Meta) ad campaigns AND film the content ourselves —
> on-site footage of real jobs — to generate qualified leads and booked jobs.
> Differentiator: in-house content creation. Service area: Lititz, Lancaster County,
> and Pennsylvania. Primary action: book a free strategy call.

## Pages
- [Home](https://g0osey99.github.io/quickscale-media/): What we do, proof, and the booking form.
- [Services](https://g0osey99.github.io/quickscale-media/services/): Meta Ads Management, In-House Content Creation, Lead Funnel & Automation, plus FAQs.
- [Process](https://g0osey99.github.io/quickscale-media/process/): Strategy Call → Content Day → Campaign Launch → Follow-Up & Optimization.
- [About](https://g0osey99.github.io/quickscale-media/about/): Who we are, what we believe, and the founders (Daniel Demidovich, Ty Eckert).
- [Contact](https://g0osey99.github.io/quickscale-media/contact/): Book a free, no-obligation strategy call.
- [Privacy Policy](https://g0osey99.github.io/quickscale-media/privacy/): How we handle the information you submit.
- [Terms of Service](https://g0osey99.github.io/quickscale-media/terms/): Terms for using the site.

## Canonical
- Domain: https://g0osey99.github.io/quickscale-media
- Sitemap: https://g0osey99.github.io/quickscale-media/sitemap.xml
